special_mechanics.name: Alert Mode / Reinforcement System
special_mechanics.description: Two-tier alert system: single exclamation mark triggers only screen enemies; double exclamation mark or camera/infrared/loud noise triggers off-screen reinforcements. Snake escapes by eliminating enemies, moving outdoors, entering elevator, or entering boss battle.

special_mechanics.name: Rank System
special_mechanics.description: Player rank increases after rescuing 5 hostages (max 4 stars). Affects carrying capacity and maximum health. Rank decreases if hostage is killed.

special_mechanics.name: Melee Combat
special_mechanics.description: Snake can punch enemies to defeat them without alert if undetected. Defeated guards yield rations or ammo box as pickup.

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative): No quantitative movement physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is stealth-adventure with screen-based level design rather than continuous physics-based movement. Sources provide gameplay mechanics and design philosophy but not precise movement values.
sources_used: tcrf - Metal Gear (NES) - The Cutting Room Floor
